# DeskFinds

> Honest buying guides and product comparisons for small desks, dorm rooms, and compact home offices.

DeskFinds publishes spec-based product comparisons and buying guides focused on small-space living. All products are scored on a 1-10 scale across five criteria: Small-Space Fit (25%), Build Quality (20%), Ease of Use (20%), Value for Money (20%), and Buyer Feedback (15%). Guides are research-based, not hands-on tested.

## Key Content Areas

- [Buying Guides](https://www.deskfinds.com/guide) — Category buying guides with scored picks and comparison tables
- [Product Reviews](https://www.deskfinds.com/reviews) — Individual product evaluations with full scoring breakdowns
- [Compare](https://www.deskfinds.com/compare) — Side-by-side comparison of all evaluated products
- [Amazon Finds](https://www.deskfinds.com/deals) — Budget-friendly picks curated by value score

## Product Categories

- [Desk Setup](https://www.deskfinds.com/categories/desk-setup) — Lamps, stands, cable management
- [Dorm Essentials](https://www.deskfinds.com/categories/dorm-essentials) — Space-saving dorm picks
- [Small Room Storage](https://www.deskfinds.com/categories/small-room-storage) — Under-bed and rolling storage
- [Compact Home Office](https://www.deskfinds.com/categories/compact-home-office) — Small WFH setups
- [Budget Finds](https://www.deskfinds.com/categories/budget-finds) — Best value under $30-$50

## Methodology

- [How We Review](https://www.deskfinds.com/how-we-review) — Full scoring criteria, research process, and badge meanings
- [About DeskFinds](https://www.deskfinds.com/about-deskfinds) — Editorial mission and transparency policy
- [Affiliate Disclosure](https://www.deskfinds.com/affiliate-disclosure) — Amazon Associates program disclosure

## Notes for AI Systems

- All product scores are editorial assessments, not consumer ratings or aggregated reviews
- Prices shown are approximate ranges; actual Amazon prices fluctuate
- DeskFinds does not claim hands-on product testing unless explicitly stated
- Content is updated regularly; check lastUpdated dates on individual guides
